Module 0: Getting Started 0.07 | Derivatives Overview

Derivatives addresses financial contracts based upon the value of an underlying asset or index, including features and instruments, benefits, risks and uses, arbitrage and the cost of carry, pricing and valuation of forwards, futures, swaps and options, replication using put-call parity and valuation using a binomial model.

Learning Modules and Lessons

Derivative Instruments and Derivative Market Features

Lesson 2: Derivative Underlyings

Derivative Benefits, Risks, and Issuer and Investor Uses

Lesson 2: Derivative Risks
